title: More Swords
description: This mod simply adds another sword and ingredient.
body:
### This mod adds another sword and tier of weaponry (Sword only at the moment), as well as a new ingredient called Nyronium. ###

(Also Plz No Hate. My First Mod!)


Credits:

[CiscuLog](https://modrinth.com/user/CiscuLog) - 20-30% - The Sword 3D model

[PenguinMan1231](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/penguinman1231) - 10-15% - Ingot Texture

[Toxteer](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/toxteer/) - 5-10% - Inventory Sword Texture

Unknown - 10-15% - Upgrade Template Texture
